label: Argentina / Spanish
ladderNote: Porteño usage from Argentine media and local forums (La Nación, r/argentina, r/BuenosAires). Dropped US-calque "estamos hablando" — no solid local dating-stage evidence.

levels.term: No hay nada / no pasa nada
levels.meaning: Nothing going on.
There's chemistry / a vibe. Used casually by Argentines.
Flirting; showing interest. Common in BA speech (e.g. local Reddit).
We're getting to know each other.
We made out (kissed with tongue). Local Argentine slang.
One-off casual sex. Real Argentine slang (also tachango); covered by Fundéu Argentina / local dictionaries.
Hookup / regular hookup; crude.
Casual sex/dating partner without formal commitment. La Nación + local Reddit staple.
Friends with benefits; more friendship history than a chongo.
We're seeing each other; still soft on labels.
Dating toward possible noviazgo; distinct from chongo. Discussed on r/argentina.
Situationship / almost-relationship. Argentine media and everyday speech.
Exclusive without calling each other novios. Newer phrasing; shows up in Argentine social media.
Official boyfriend/girlfriend.
We're a couple / my partner; more adult than novio.
Living together as a couple (everyday colloquial).
Legal civil cohabitation registration (Código Civil) — formal/legal, not casual slang.
Engaged.
Married.
Married with children (also a famous Argentine sitcom title).
